Name: Carey Whitehead
Title: Vice-Chair
Hearing Notes: Discussed impacts on adjacent car wash access; weighed TOD and climate resilience policies; motioned to recommend denial based on Comprehensive Plan inconsistency

Name: Dugan Caswell
Title: Secretary
Hearing Notes: Discussed I-2 zoning proximity to residential areas; stated detriments outweigh benefits; made motion finding project inconsistent with Comprehensive Plan

Name: Thomas Johnson
Hearing Notes: Discussed EV charging station operations and ownership uncertainties

Name: Mary-Margaret Marshall
Hearing Notes: Discussed powerline timelines; stated data centers should be located in Technology Overlay District; seconded motions for inconsistency and denial

Name: Jane McDonald
Hearing Notes: Raised questions on temporary bridging timeline and environmental impacts; commented on Comprehensive Plan goals and lack of I-95 connection

Name: Joseph Winterer
Hearing Notes: Discussed environmental aspects of land bay conveyance areas in Chesapeake Bay Preservation Area; addressed ROW dedications and setbacks; noted development inevitability but emphasized mitigation
